name: Baby Food Doggie Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 Jars Baby Food, beef or carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls and place them on a greased cookie sheet.
3. Flatten each ball slightly with a fork.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes, or until browned.
5. Cool on wire racks and store in the refrigerator. These cookies also freeze well.
6. An alternative method is to substitute Cream Of Wheat for wheat germ, then use a tablespoon to form cookie-sized drops on a plate.
7. Microwave these drops for 4 minutes at medium-high power, monitoring closely and starting with only 3 1/2 minutes if needed.
8. These come out soft. For an alternative flavor option, consider using Beef/Vegetable Dinner Baby Dinner instead of beef or chicken.
